context.goal: Confirm that any change on ctrl or in eventually produces a visible change on out without relying on fixed timing.
stimulus_intent: Only deterministic, contract-supported stimulus is used; otherwise the case is downgraded.

timing_assumptions: Use reset-safe or protocol-safe observation windows only.
Do not assume fixed latency; monitor out over multiple cycles after stimulus.
